_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: What bullpen moves are incoming for the Red Sox with Slaten returning?
items.snark: Weissert might get DFAed after blowing another lead, couldn't happen to a nicer ERA north of five.

items.headline: Roman Anthony headed to IL with wrist sprain, hopes for minimum stay
items.snark: Lineup built around a 21-year-old who can't stay healthy, what could possibly go wrong with that plan.

items.headline: Franklin Arias shoots up 34 spots on MLB Top 100 prospect list
items.snark: Farm system pumping out studs while the big club can't hit water falling out of a boat, just Sox things.

items.headline: Rays 8, Red Sox 4: Weissert blows tie game in sixth, win streak ends at three
items.snark: Greg Weissert pitched like garbage, came in and torched the comeback faster than your drunk uncle at Thanksgiving.

items.headline: The Red Sox might have a chance after all, 1.5 games out of wild card
items.snark: Only 1.5 games out because the whole AL decided to suck simultaneously, what a time to be alive.

items.headline: Red Sox prospect Juan Valera undergoes Tommy John surgery, out for season
items.snark: Number four prospect gets Tommy John, Red Sox pitching depth thinner than the Zakim at rush hour now.

items.headline: Breslow still believes Red Sox are playoff team despite 16-21 start
items.snark: Breslow believing in playoffs after firing the manager is big divorced dad energy, just incredible stuff.

items.headline: Patriots rookie minicamp 2026: Schedule, participants, tryouts and more
items.snark: Rookie minicamp this weekend, Caleb Lomu getting his first real look at how much the weather sucks here.

items.headline: Patriots schedule release rumored for May 13 or 14, leaks tracker
items.snark: Schedule release next week means seven more days of pretending we care about joint practices with Philly.

items.headline: Patriots 2026 schedule sneakier than it looks, ranked 12th easiest in NFL
items.snark: Twelfth easiest schedule but still gotta play Chiefs and Lions on the road, math is a cruel mistress.

items.headline: First round pick Caleb Lomu addresses media ahead of rookie minicamp
items.snark: Lomu already doing pressers, kid better get used to explaining why the offense stalled in the red zone.

items.headline: Patriots rookie Caleb Lomu sees his locker for first time at facility
items.snark: Lomu found his locker, now someone help him find the cafeteria before he gets lost in Foxborough.
